name: Send File Attachment
description: Sends and delivers an existing file from Yui's sandbox workspace (user_data) back to the user via the active Telegram or Discord channel or a specified recipient.

filename.description: The name of the file currently residing in Yui's local sandbox data folder (e.g. 'summary.pdf' or 'photo.jpg').

caption.description: An optional text caption/message to accompany the file.

recipient.description: Optional Telegram username, perceived name, or raw Chat ID to send to. If left blank, Yui will automatically deliver it to the active conversational chat channel.
